name: engrammemory
description: Persistent semantic memory for AI agents. Store, search, and recall memories across sessions using a three-tier recall engine (hot cache, hash index, vector search).
author: EngramMemory

tools.name: memory_store
tools.title: Store Memory
tools.description: Store a memory with semantic embedding

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.title: Recall Context
tools.description: Recall relevant memories for context injection

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.title: Forget Memory
tools.description: Delete a memory from all tiers

tools.name: memory_feedback
tools.title: Give Feedback
tools.description: Report which search results were useful to improve recall

tools.name: memory_connect
tools.title: Discover Connections
tools.description: Discover cross-category connections via the entity graph

tools.name: memory_graph
tools.title: Render Memory Graph
tools.description: Render an interactive HTML visualisation of memories from a host-LLM-built {nodes, edges} spec

prompts.name: graph
prompts.title: Visualise Memory Graph
prompts.description: End-to-end /graph workflow: model fetches memories, extracts entities, builds edges, and calls memory_graph to render an interactive HTML page.

examples.prompt: Remember that I prefer TypeScript over JavaScript for all new projects
examples.description: Store a preference memory that persists across sessions

examples.prompt: What do you know about my database setup?
examples.description: Search memories for relevant context about infrastructure decisions

examples.prompt: What have I been working on recently?
examples.description: Recall broad context about recent activity and decisions

prerequisites.description: Requires the Engram Memory container running locally
